changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 10

changeSet.comment: Create Reporting and REDCap Integration page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Finalize results and integrate with external systems. Generate final reports (summary, detailed, QC, statistical, or audit trail). Configure REDCap project settings and submit validated data. Archive completed samples with full audit trail. System generates reports, submits to REDCap, archives results, and maintains complete audit trail for regulatory compliance.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 10

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND display_order = 10

changeSet.comment: Insert MNTD Reporting and REDCap Integration workflow page template

column.name: description
column.value: Finalize results, generate reports, and integrate with external systems like REDCap

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Generate final reports (summary, detailed, QC, statistical, audit trail). Configure REDCap project settings and submit validated data. Archive completed samples with full audit trail for regulatory compliance.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Reporting and REDCap Integration - External system integration and final reporting
